summary: Units module testing complete. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with all features working: Units Panel displays correctly with financial badges, resident lists, create/assign/delete functionality. Multi-tenant isolation confirmed.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed (existing issue from previous iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/units correctly returns units enriched with residents (from users collection by apartment match) and finance (from unit_accounts by unit_id match)
POST /api/units creates unit and auto-creates unit_account for financial tracking
POST /api/units with duplicate number correctly returns 409 Conflict
DELETE /api/units/{id} checks for financial records before deletion (prevents data loss)
PUT /api/units/{id}/assign-user updates user's apartment field to link to unit
Multi-tenant isolation: all queries filter by condominium_id
UnitsPanel component correctly displays units with financial badges and resident lists
All data-testid attributes present for testing (units-panel, btn-create-unit, create-unit-dialog, assign-user-dialog, etc.)
seed_data_creation: Test units created with TEST_UNIT_ prefix are auto-cleaned after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Units module fully implemented and tested. Units A-101 through A-103 exist with assigned residents. A-101 has 4 residents assigned, A-102 has 'Residente de Prueba', A-103 shows 'Sin residentes asignados'. Financial badges show balance/status correctly. All CRUD operations and user assignment working.

backend_apis.GET /api/units: Returns list of units with residents and finance info - PASSED
backend_apis.POST /api/units: Creates new unit and auto-creates unit_account - PASSED
backend_apis.DELETE /api/units/{id}: Deletes unit (only if no financial records) - PASSED

frontend_ui.units_panel: Displays in Finanzas page with unit list - VERIFIED
frontend_ui.create_unit_dialog: Has number input and submit button - VERIFIED
frontend_ui.assign_user_icon: Opens dialog with user selector - VERIFIED
frontend_ui.unassign_button: X button present for each resident - VERIFIED
frontend_ui.delete_unit_button: Trash icon present for each unit - VERIFIED
frontend_ui.financial_badge: Shows balance/status (USD amount or 'Al día') - VERIFIED
frontend_ui.resident_list: Shows name and email for each assigned resident - VERIFIED
